---
name: Security boundary report
about: Report public repository material that may expose private operational information
title: "[security-boundary] "
labels: security,boundary
assignees: ""
---

## Public material involved

Link to the public file, line, or wording.

## Boundary concern

Describe the concern without adding new private material.

Examples:

- private deployment detail appears exposed
- public wording implies access to private runtime proof
- claim appears stronger than the public evidence supports
- issue or PR text may invite unsafe disclosure

## Suggested handling

Suggest whether the material should be clarified, removed, redacted, or moved to controlled private review.

Do not include keys, private paths, hostnames, IP addresses, hashes, receipts, permit material, topology, or deployment commands.
